title: Starke Ayres Vegetable Production Guide
content:
Starke Ayres Vegetable Guide

# Broccoli Production
Total water requirement is approximately 440mm. Apply 10-15mm per week for first third of season, then 25mm per week. Do not let soil dry out.

# Fertilization
Broccoli is a heavy feeder. N: 200kg/ha, P: 80kg/ha, K: 150kg/ha. Sensitive to Boron and Molybdenum deficiency.

# Harvesting
Harvest when heads are compact. Cut stem a few cm below head. Cool immediately.

# General Vegetable Seeds
Starke Ayres produces wide range including tomato, onion, cabbage suited for Southern Africa.
